reasoning: FIDE ratings are published monthly on the 1st of the month. The rating captured on 2026-02-15 will be the rating from the February 2026 list (2559). On 2026-02-22, the Wikipedia page will still reflect the February FIDE list, meaning no change in rating (0% increase vs the 1% required). For 2026-03-17, the rating will reflect the March 1 FIDE list. To achieve a 1% increase, Ju Wenjun would need to gain at least 26 points in a single month (reaching ~2585). For an established GM rated 2559, a 26-point jump in one rating period is extremely rare, requiring an historically massive performance in a classical tournament. Checks of live chess ratings and 2026 tournament calendars indicate she is not currently on track for such a massive rating gain. Thus, the probability for both dates is near zero, with a slightly higher chance for the March date simply due to it falling in a new rating period.
